title: B.Sc. (Honors with Research) Biotechnology
content: XIIth with Physics Chemistry & Biology with 50% marks Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list For Migration from Other Universities: 1) B.Sc (Hons/Hons with Research) Biotechnology Ist yr. minimum 50% marks or 5.0 CGPA on a 10 point scale 2) XII with Science (PCB) with minimum 50% marks. 01 The B.Sc. (Hons. with Research) in Biotechnology program aims to provide students with a strong interdisciplinary foundation in biotechnology, integrating theory, practical skills, and research. 02 It prepares graduates for advanced studies, research, and industry roles by fostering scientific thinking, technical expertise, and ethical responsibility to develop innovative solutions in healthcare, agriculture, and the environment. 01 02 03 04 05 Environment and sustainability: Understand the impact of the professional scientific solutions in societal and environmental contexts, and demonstrate the knowledge of, and need for, sustainable development. 06 07 08 01 Graduates shall acquire and apply in-depth knowledge of biotechnology and related interdisciplinary domains to independently conduct ethical and impactful scientific research, addressing real-world challenges. 02 Graduates shall demonstrate strong analytical, technical, and research-oriented competencies, enabling them to pursue advanced studies (M.Sc., M.Tech., Ph.D.) and to build successful careers in biotechnology industries, academia, and research organizations, both nationally and globally. 01 Research and Technical Proficiency in Biotechnology: Graduates will demonstrate advanced competency in utilizing modern biotechnological tools and methods for experimental design, data acquisition, and interpretation across domains such as molecular biology, genetic engineering, bioinformatics, and bioprocess technology. 02 Innovation, Application, and Societal Impact: Graduates will apply biotechnological principles to design sustainable, ethical, and innovative solutions in healthcare, agriculture, environmental management, and industrial biotechnology, contributing to product development and translational research. XIIth with Physics Chemistry & Biology with 50% marks Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list For Migration from Other Universities: 1) B.Sc (Hons/Hons with Research) Biotechnology Ist yr. minimum 50% marks or 5.0 CGPA on a 10 point scale 2) XII with Science (PCB) with minimum 50% marks.
